title: euodoo #2137
definition:
1) to grant a prosperous and expeditious journey, to lead by a
    direct and easy way
 2) to grant a successful issue, to cause to prosper
 3) to prosper, be successful
nasbUsage:

 2) to grant a successful issue, to cause to prosper
